chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.468 of 2024 Director General Pakistan Randers (Sindh) Versus Collachi Cooperative Housing Society & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2883/24 2. For orders on CMA 2867/24 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 2868/24 Dated: 11.11.2024 Mr. Noor Muhammad Dayo for appellant. -.-.- Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1 along with a statement annexing therewith certain documents, which is taken on record. In the instant appeal the appellant has impugned an order of 24.09.2024 whereby, after recording and/or taking into consideration the statements of the Law Officers of province and federation, the application under order VII Rule 11 CPC was dismissed. It is appellant’s case, as he has attempted, that the statement as recorded that the law officers have not disputed the status of the land, would come in the way of the appellant when the suit will proceed on merits. We are afraid that this was observation of the Bench while disposing off application under order VII Rule 11 CPC; all that was recorded was the statement of the law officers of the province as well as federation and the conclusion/observation was only to the extent of dismissal of the application, referred above. Nonetheless, since the defendants in the suit have already stated to have filed their written statements, suit will be taken to its logical end per pleadings and record, under the law. Appeal stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
